view.title: Validate explicit UC need #3
view.subtitle: Step failed: Exploratory validation failed: The requirement for multiple time slots per day is not validated as satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 3 failed
blocks.message: Step failed: Exploratory validation failed: The requirement for multiple time slots per day is not validated as satisfied.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation failed: The requirement for multiple time slots per day is not validated as satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having multiple time slots per day. However, the evidence provided only confirms that there are two time slots available (10am and 2pm) but does not demonstrate that these slots are operational or that they can accommodate bookings simultaneously. The evidence indicates that only 3 participants are currently booked, which does not meet the requirement for the minimum number of participants needed to run the tour, thus confirming a gap in the requirement coverage for multiple time slots. This is supported by the gaps identified in prior validations regarding participant counts.
